name: Preset API Skills
description: AI agent skills for the Preset API, Superset workspace APIs, Snowflake Cortex Agents, and sensitive direct API workflow guardrails.

skills.name: preset-api
skills.description: Authenticate with the Preset Management API. Required by all other skills.

skills.name: preset-workspaces
skills.description: List Preset teams and workspaces, resolve workspace hostnames, and inspect workspace membership.

skills.name: preset-admin
skills.description: Manage Preset team memberships, workspace lifecycle, invites, role identifiers, and audit logs with confirmation.

skills.name: preset-superset
skills.description: Discover workspace Superset version, OpenAPI, current-user permissions, menu capabilities, and API safety classification.

skills.name: preset-dashboards
skills.description: Inspect dashboards, charts, dashboard tabs, screenshots, thumbnails, and chart data safety boundaries.

skills.name: preset-datasets
skills.description: Inspect databases, schemas, catalogs, tables, datasets, columns, metrics, table metadata, and data-returning dataset boundaries.

skills.name: preset-database-connections
skills.description: Inspect or route database connection configuration, validation, OAuth, upload, and mutation workflows with credential-aware approval.

skills.name: preset-destructive-imports
skills.description: Review and route destructive or overwrite-capable import workflows with explicit approval.

skills.name: preset-embedded-rls
skills.description: Review row-level security clauses for embedded analytics and guest-token workflows.

skills.name: preset-sqllab
skills.description: Inspect SQL Lab bootstrap, query history, saved queries, and SQL execution safety boundaries.

skills.name: preset-import-export
skills.description: Route Superset workspace import/export workflows with disclosure and mutation gates.

skills.name: preset-embedding
skills.description: Inspect embedded dashboard configuration and route guest-token/trusted-domain workflows to security-sensitive review.

skills.name: preset-guest-tokens
skills.description: Create and route embedded dashboard guest-token workflows with explicit approval and token-handling guardrails.

skills.name: preset-roles-permissions
skills.description: Review and route role, workspace membership, permission, and access-control changes with explicit approval.

skills.name: preset-sql-execution
skills.description: Run or route SQL Lab execution, result retrieval, exports, query stop, saved-query mutations, and SQL Lab permalink creation with explicit approval.

skills.name: preset-snowflake-cortex
skills.description: Prepare Snowflake Cortex account, authentication, role, warehouse, and safety context.

skills.name: preset-cortex-agents
skills.description: List, describe, create, update, delete, and run Snowflake Cortex Agents with explicit approval.
